text: The juxtaposition of communal learning in the first space and the tactile, visually stimulating design in the second fills me with a sense of creative curiosity. I feel like a participant in an ongoing dialogue between intellect and sensation, reality and imagination. The clean, glass-encased room inspires contemplation and focus, while the bright, immersive R+D wall feels energetic and futuristic. I am acutely aware of my presence as both an observer and a thinker, surrounded by environments shaped to encourage innovation and understanding. It awakens in me a desire to engage more deeply with ideas and the people around me.
